title: Department Manager Vacancy at Forever 21 India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Forever 21 India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Forever 21 India! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Dhanbad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Forever 21 India:
Forever 21 India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Forever 21 India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
